endpoint.label: Veo 3.1
endpoint.summary: Submit Veo 3.1 fast, lite, and quality jobs through APIDot's unified async generation endpoint.
endpoint.about: Veo 3.1 keeps the same APIDot submit-and-track workflow as other generation models. All variants support text-to-video. `veo3.1-fast` and `veo3.1-quality` also support image-guided generation through `input.image_urls`, while `veo3.1-lite` should be treated as text-only.
bestPractices: Use `veo3.1-fast` or `veo3.1-lite` for iteration and move to `veo3.1-quality` when you need the most premium final output.
Keep prompts explicit about motion, camera perspective, sound intent, and visual continuity.
For image-guided requests, match `generate_type` to the number of uploaded images and avoid sending unsupported combinations to `veo3.1-lite`.

faq.question: Which Veo 3.1 model id should I use?
faq.answer: Use `veo3.1-fast` for faster turnaround, `veo3.1-lite` for lower-cost text-only generation, and `veo3.1-quality` for the highest-end result quality.

faq.question: How does `generate_type` work?
faq.answer: Use `frame` when you provide two images for first/last frame control. Use `reference` when you provide three reference images. Do not send `generate_type` or `image_urls` to `veo3.1-lite`.

request.name: callback_url
request.description: Optional webhook callback URL for terminal task updates.

request.name: input.prompt
request.description: Main prompt describing scene, motion, audio intent, and target aesthetic.

request.name: input.duration
request.description: Requested duration in seconds. Veo 3.1 is fixed at 8 seconds.

request.name: input.generate_type
request.description: Optional image-guided generation mode. Use `frame` for two images or `reference` for three images.

request.name: input.image_urls
request.description: Optional image inputs for image-guided runs. Use up to 3 images, each publicly accessible and under 10MB.

response.name: code
response.description: HTTP-style status code. Successful submits return `200`.

response.name: data.task_id
response.description: Async task identifier returned immediately after submission.

errors.name: invalid_request
errors.description: Missing fields, unsupported generate mode, or invalid image input combinations.

errors.name: authentication_error
errors.description: Missing, expired, or invalid Bearer API key.

errors.name: insufficient_credits
errors.description: The current prepaid balance cannot cover the Veo 3.1 request.

errors.name: rate_limited
errors.description: The API key is temporarily above the allowed submission rate.

sample.curl:
curl --request POST \
  --url https://api.apidot.ai/api/generate/submit \
  --header 'Authorization: Bearer <APIDOT_API_KEY>' \
  --header 'Content-Type: application/json' \
  --data '
{
  "model": "veo3.1-fast",
  "callback_url": "https://your-domain.com/callback",
  "input": {
    "prompt": "A cinematic nighttime city drive with synchronized ambient audio",
    "duration": 8,
    "aspect_ratio": "16:9",
    "resolution": "720p"
  }
}
'
sample.python:
import os
from apidot import APIDot

client = APIDot(api_key=os.environ["APIDOT_API_KEY"])

request = {
    "model": "veo3.1-fast",
    "callback_url": "https://your-domain.com/callback",
    "input": {
        "prompt": "A cinematic nighttime city drive with synchronized ambient audio",
        "duration": 8,
        "aspect_ratio": "16:9",
        "resolution": "720p"
    }
}

response = client.generate(
    endpoint="/api/generate/submit",
    **request
)

input.prompt: A cinematic nighttime city drive with synchronized ambient audio
A miniature city waking up at sunrise, cinematic light, smooth camera motion
A high-detail aerial shot of a coastal city at dusk with cinematic motion and native ambient sound
A cinematic nighttime city drive with synchronized ambient audio
